'''鈭歵h-p-ng''' ('''kathapang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrocauterise|electrocauterise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrocauterise|electrocauterise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-p-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kathapang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithapang|thithapang]] || [[word:jithapang|jithapang]] || [[word:shithapang|shithapang]] || [[word:kithapang|kithapang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthapang|thuthuthapang]] || [[word:jujuthapang|jujuthapang]] || [[word:shushuthapang|shushuthapang]] || [[word:kukuthapang|kukuthapang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthapang|thuthapang]] || [[word:juthapang|juthapang]] || [[word:shuthapang|shuthapang]] || [[word:kuthapang|kuthapang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthapang|thuthapang]] || [[word:juthapang|juthapang]] || [[word:shuthapang|shuthapang]] || [[word:kuthapang|kuthapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethapang|thethapang]] || [[word:jethapang|jethapang]] || [[word:shethapang|shethapang]] || [[word:kethapang|kethapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothapang|thothothapang]] || [[word:jojothapang|jojothapang]] || [[word:shoshothapang|shoshothapang]] || [[word:kokothapang|kokothapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothapang|thothapang]] || [[word:jothapang|jothapang]] || [[word:shothapang|shothapang]] || [[word:kothapang|kothapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothapang|thothapang]] || [[word:jothapang|jothapang]] || [[word:shothapang|shothapang]] || [[word:kothapang|kothapang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]] || [[word:thapang|thapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thapang|th忙thapang]] || [[word:j忙thapang|j忙thapang]] || [[word:sh忙thapang|sh忙thapang]] || [[word:k忙thapang|k忙thapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathapang|thathathapang]] || [[word:jajathapang|jajathapang]] || [[word:shashathapang|shashathapang]] || [[word:kakathapang|kakathapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathapang|thathapang]] || [[word:jathapang|jathapang]] || [[word:shathapang|shathapang]] || [[word:kathapang|kathapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathapang|thathapang]] || [[word:jathapang|jathapang]] || [[word:shathapang|shathapang]] || [[word:kathapang|kathapang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathapang|shathapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathapang|goshathapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathapang|gokishathapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathapangn眉|shathapangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathapangnkn眉|goshathapangnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathapangn眉|gokishathapangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathapangsh毛|shathapangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathapangnksh毛|goshathapangnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathapangsh毛|gokishathapangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathapangro|shathapangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathapangnkro|goshathapangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathapangro|gokishathapangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathapangmu|shathapangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathapangnkmu|goshathapangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathapangmu|gokishathapangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathapangsher|shathapangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathapangnksher|goshathapangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathapangsher|gokishathapangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathapangng|shathapangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathapangnkng|goshathapangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathapangng|gokishathapangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathapangya|shathapangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathapangnkya|goshathapangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathapangya|gokishathapangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathapangyam|shathapangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathapangnkyam|goshathapangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathapangyam|gokishathapangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathapangn眉sh毛|shathapangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathapangnkn眉sh毛|goshathapangnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathapangn眉sh毛|gokishathapangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathapangn眉ro|shathapangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathapangnkn眉ro|goshathapangnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathapangn眉ro|gokishathapangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathapangn眉mu|shathapangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathapangnkn眉mu|goshathapangnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathapangn眉mu|gokishathapangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathapangsh毛n眉|shathapangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathapangnksh毛n眉|goshathapangnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathapangsh毛n眉|gokishathapangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathapangsh毛ro|shathapangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathapangnksh毛ro|goshathapangnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathapangsh毛ro|gokishathapangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathapangsh毛mu|shathapangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathapangnksh毛mu|goshathapangnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathapangsh毛mu|gokishathapangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathapangron眉|shathapangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathapangnkron眉|goshathapangnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathapangron眉|gokishathapangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathapangrosh毛|shathapangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathapangnkrosh毛|goshathapangnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathapangrosh毛|gokishathapangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathapangromu|shathapangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathapangnkromu|goshathapangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathapangromu|gokishathapangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathapangmun眉|shathapangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathapangnkmun眉|goshathapangnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathapangmun眉|gokishathapangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathapangmush毛|shathapangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathapangnkmush毛|goshathapangnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathapangmush毛|gokishathapangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathapangmuro|shathapangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathapangnkmuro|goshathapangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathapangmuro|gokishathapangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
